system.location: Wooded hills above a quiet village
system.income: Village rents, a small mill share, occasional silver from Tribunal work

vis.notes: Herbâm from the oak grove each Autumn; Vim from a fragile regio spring — contested if neighbors learn of it.

system.library: Borrowing of common books requires a magus sponsor. Lab texts stay with their owners unless voted into the library.
system.laboratories: Shared workshop for overflow work; personal labs listed as Laboratory items.
system.turb: A dozen covenfolk, a steward, a blacksmith, and six grogs under a veteran sergeant (link named grogs on Members).
system.charter: Equal votes among member magi. Vis from covenant sources is shared by vote. Guests may stay one season with a sponsor; longer stays require unanimous consent.
system.hooks: The grove’s regio is thinning. A nearby lord wants clearer taxes from the village. Rumors of a hedge tradition in the deep woods.
system.boons: Friendly village priest (within reason). Hidden site. Reliable Herbâm harvest.
system.notes: Starter covenant for new sagas. Use Seasonal planner from the sheet header. Link player characters via the Members tab.
Basic shared lab space for visitors and overflow.
